name: companion-booking
description: Fullstack companion booking — chạy backend + frontend cùng lúc

scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.e2e:run: concurrently -n seed,backend,frontend,cypress -c magenta,blue,green,yellow "npm run seed:e2e" "cross-env PORT=3001 npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --port 5174 --strictPort" "cross-env CYPRESS_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5174 CYPRESS_API_URL=http://localhost:3001/api npm run cypress:run"
